# N6 Ultimate: An Arithmetically Optimal AI Accelerator with Zero Arbitrary Constants

**Authors:** TECS-L Research Group

**Preprint.** Submitted to arXiv: cs.AR, cs.AI

**Contact:** github.com/need-singularity/TECS-L

---

## Abstract

We present the N6 Ultimate, an AI accelerator architecture in which all 69 design parameters derive from the arithmetic functions of the perfect number 6. The processor features 144 streaming multiprocessors ($\sigma^2 = 12^2$) organized in 12 Graphics Processin
